subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath attained the presence of the Wronged One time and again, who hath hearkened unto the Call and entered the Station [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن فاز بلقاء المظلوم مره بعد مره و سمع الندآء و دخل المقام
subcodes.subjects: @justice and wrath of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution
